title: Yum Yum's 27 Pack of Multi Colour Baby Play Mat – 29x29cm EVA Foam Mats for Kids – Soft & Non Slip Interlocking Floor Mats – Waterproof 7mm Thick Foam Play Mat -Safe and Comfortable for Children
features: SOFT & SAFE BABY PLAY MAT AREA – Give your little one a safe and comfortable space to explore with these colourful, cushioned baby play mats for floor. Made from soft EVA foam, this padded play mat helps reduce the impact of falls and tumbles, offering peace of mind during playtime.

CUSTOMISABLE INTERLOCKING FOAM FLOOR TILES – The easy-to-connect interlocking foam tiles allow you to create a play area that fits your space. Whether in the nursery, bedroom, living room or garden, these interlocking mats form a stable, non-slip surface for all types of play.

MULTIPLE SIZE OPTIONS FOR FLEXIBLE FLOOR COVERAGE – Choose from sets of 9, 18, 27, or 36 foam play mat tiles to cover both small and large play areas. These foam floor mats offer a soft, cushioned surface perfect for crawling, learning to walk, or floor games with siblings.

EASY TO CLEAN AND MAINTAIN FOAM MATS – Designed for busy families, these kids foam mats are easy to wipe clean with a damp cloth. Whether used as outdoor play mats or floor mats for children, they stay looking fresh and tidy after everyday spills, snacks, and messes.

NON-TOXIC, BABY-SAFE EVA FOAM MATERIAL – Crafted from high-quality, non-toxic EVA foam, these foam mats for kids are free from lead, latex, phthalates and other harmful substances. Ideal as a baby foam play mat, foam tiles for babies, or a long-lasting outdoor foam mat.
